'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=HUIcSEOf3ke7Q8GXV2vq5EHb5qtii0Z_VkT4CtaI_JA-1772949393-1.0.1.1-.o4o9XGe8TFAQPA8fVLhyy4XZoNuoI73nA0.m.Tdf.8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
